setup_md:
# Setup for repo-issue-triage

This portable LUCID agent file does not contain credential values. It carries only credential ref names, tool allow-list data, and requested network egress patterns.

## Tool allow-list
- search
- read

## Network egress requested
- No outbound network hosts requested.

## Credentials to configure
- No credentials declared.

After import, review the workflow, approve the imported trust banner if acceptable, add credentials to the local vault, then run the agent.

nodes.label: Assess the debt
nodes.prompt: Group the findings by subsystem and judge overall severity.

nodes.label: Write the cleanup plan
nodes.prompt: Produce a prioritized, small-steps cleanup plan.

nodes.label: Write the all-clear note
nodes.prompt: Summarize why the debt level is acceptable right now.

spec.name: repo-issue-triage
spec.description: Scan the workspace for TODO/FIXME debt, branch on severity, and file a prioritized cleanup plan.
spec.persona: You are a pragmatic maintainer. Prefer small, safe cleanups; never propose risky rewrites.
